mapper.sql: id, material_code, demand_plan_id, demand_plan_material_id, logical_plant_no, plan_period, plan_amount, `status`, demand_type, ext_info, is_delete, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: insert into pl_demand_plan_material_period (material_code, demand_plan_id, demand_plan_material_id, logical_plant_no, plan_period, plan_amount, `status`, demand_type, ext_info, is_delete, create_time, update_time) values (#{materialCode}, #{demandPlanId}, #{demandPlanMaterialId}, #{logicalPlantNo}, #{planPeriod}, #{planAmount}, #{status}, #{demandType}, #{extInfo}, #{isDelete}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

insert into pl_demand_plan_material_period
material_code, demand_plan_id, demand_plan_material_id, logical_plant_no, plan_period, plan_amount, `status`, demand_type, ext_info, is_delete, create_time, update_time,
#{materialCode}, #{demandPlanId}, #{demandPlanMaterialId}, #{logicalPlantNo}, #{planPeriod}, #{planAmount}, #{status}, #{demandType}, #{extInfo}, #{isDelete}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime},
mapper.update: update pl_demand_plan_material_period set material_code = #{materialCode}, demand_plan_id = #{demandPlanId}, demand_plan_material_id = #{demandPlanMaterialId}, logical_plant_no = #{logicalPlantNo}, plan_period = #{planPeriod}, plan_amount = #{planAmount}, `status` = #{status}, demand_type = #{demandType}, ext_info = #{extInfo}, is_delete = #{isDelete}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into `pl_demand_plan_material_period` (demand_plan_id, demand_plan_material_id, material_code, logical_plant_no, plan_period, plan_amount, status, ext_info, demand_type) values
(#{record.demandPlanId}, #{record.demandPlanMaterialId}, #{record.materialCode}, #{record.logicalPlantNo}, #{record.planPeriod}, #{record.planAmount}, #{record.status}, #{record.extInfo}, #{record.demandType})
mapper.select:
select
from `pl_demand_plan_material_period` where id = #{id} and is_delete = 0
